ssc-higher-math-ch11-set06-q01.explanation: m=(y₂−y₁)/(x₂−x₁)=(-1−1)/(4−1)=-2/3। — Slope নির্ণয় previous-year pattern-এ গুরুত্বপূর্ণ। — Board-standard concept টপিকটি syllabus + model/board pattern অনুযায়ী repeated high-priority area।

ssc-higher-math-ch11-set06-q02.explanation: মধ্যবিন্দু=((4+6)/2, (2+6)/2)=(5, 4)। — Midpoint formula board-standard short calculation। — Board-standard concept টপিকটি syllabus + model/board pattern অনুযায়ী repeated high-priority area।

ssc-higher-math-ch11-set06-q03.explanation: d=√[(5−1)²+(1−-2)²]=√25=5। — Coordinate geometry-এর distance formula previous board pattern-এ repeated। — Board-standard concept টপিকটি syllabus + model/board pattern অনুযায়ী repeated high-priority area।

ssc-higher-math-ch11-set06-q04.explanation: m=(y₂−y₁)/(x₂−x₁)=(6−3)/(6−2)=3/4। — Slope নির্ণয় previous-year pattern-এ গুরুত্বপূর্ণ। — Board-standard concept টপিকটি syllabus + model/board pattern অনুযায়ী repeated high-priority area।

ssc-higher-math-ch11-set06-q05.explanation: মধ্যবিন্দু=((0+4)/2, (2+8)/2)=(2, 5)। — Midpoint formula board-standard short calculation। — Board-standard concept টপিকটি syllabus + model/board pattern অনুযায়ী repeated high-priority area।

ssc-higher-math-ch11-set06-q06.explanation: d=√[(7−2)²+(11−-1)²]=√169=13। — Coordinate geometry-এর distance formula previous board pattern-এ repeated। — Board-standard concept টপিকটি syllabus + model/board pattern অনুযায়ী repeated high-priority area।

ssc-higher-math-ch11-set06-q08.explanation: মধ্যবিন্দু=((1+7)/2, (2+4)/2)=(4, 3)। — Midpoint formula board-standard short calculation। — Board-standard concept টপিকটি syllabus + model/board pattern অনুযায়ী repeated high-priority area।

ssc-higher-math-ch11-set06-q09.explanation: d=√[(9−3)²+(8−0)²]=√100=10। — Coordinate geometry-এর distance formula previous board pattern-এ repeated। — Board-standard concept টপিকটি syllabus + model/board pattern অনুযায়ী repeated high-priority area।
